live_skills_without_template_note: Out of scope — templates/ is the roadmap-engine-owned subset. Other live skills are owned by their respective repos.
refresh_note: Re-audited after template-license-banners (5e3d5c2) added banners to 5 templates and after skill-sync-roadmap-{auto,spec} closed the prior-recorded drift. Three newcomer drifters (roadmap-orient, roadmap-term, threads) had banner+closer in template but absent from live; propagated template→live this commit per template-license-banners intent (banners are canonical form discipline, live should carry them). All 6 templates now byte-identical with live. §Honest-zero-explicit: desync_count is honestly 0 because we synced, not because we redefined the metric.
auto_fix_intent: Cosmetic banner sync template→live performed inline (3 files) — within manifest scope because banners are pure form-discipline drift, not semantic divergence.
